positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a flourishing arrangement of bioluminescent forest elements. Focus on intricate, repeating mandala patterns built from various flora, including stylized moon petals, crystalline ferns, and stylized constellations. The aesthetic should be elegant and neo-mystical, utilizing deep indigo and teal backgrounds contrasting sharply with glowing emerald, sapphire, and magenta accents. The composition must be highly detailed, clean, and symmetrical, designed for direct printing on fabric. Include subtle, repeating geometric filler patterns to enhance the all-over print effect. Art Nouveau influences meet modern psychedelic design. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, vector-like clarity.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, noise, messy lines, low detail
